headline: Phillips 66 Midstream Expansions And Valuation Signal For PSX Investors
summary: Phillips 66 (NYSE:PSX) announced plans to build the Zeus Gas Plant in the Permian Basin. The company also plans a third Coastal Bend Fractionator in Texas. Both midstream projects are expected to be in service by 2028. For investors watching NYSE:PSX, these new midstream projects arrive as the stock trades around $179.8, with returns of 2.5% over the past week and 15.0% over the past month. Over longer periods, the stock has returned 37.7% year to date and 51.1% over the past year, along...
